title: Come Together Tuesday, July 29
description: The moment I realized I'd been designing competitive events backwards—and how shifting from audience-first to community-first thinking changed everything about engagement, retention, and lasting impact.
author: Together by Design

title: Come Together Tuesday, June 24
description: In this week’s Cheers & Tiers, Erik and I talk with Kristine Johnson about her coffee-fueled fundraising magic and boardroom mentorship moments. Also inside: vote in our poll for custom tips, RSVP for typographic mayhem in Pasadena, hear how creatives are outsmarting AI, and drop a podcast review to win coffee on us.
author: Together by Design

title: Come Together Tuesday
description: What happens when a fresh graduate gets thrown into AIGA leadership with zero experience and maximum enthusiasm? You get Bernardo Margulis, a designer-turned-engineer-turned-marketing director whose career reads like a masterclass in saying yes to opportunities you're not quite ready for.
author: Together by Design

title: Come Together to Plant Seeds, June 11
description: TL;DR: We sat down with the guy who’s basically the Johnny Appleseed of AIGA chapters, and somehow this serial chapter-starter made starting design communities sound easier than assembling IKEA furniture.
author: Together by Design

title: Come Together to Serve, June 4
description: Yes, your $2 tip taught me more about customer success than your conversion funnel ever will. And a few popular Cheers & Tiers podcast episodes with design leaders who have been through it all, who still had the energy to engage in a human pyramid.
author: Together by Design

title: Come Together to Rebuild Connections, May 28
description: How do you balance multiple creative roles without burning out? This week we explore community leadership through the lens of someone juggling AIGA board duties, teaching, hosting Creative Mornings, and more—all while staying genuinely connected to the people they serve. Plus: SF Design Week kicks off, why authentic virtual events matter, and nurturing creativity beyond traditional career paths.
author: Together by Design

title: Come Together for Conversation, May 14
description: Don't miss our chat with Frances Yllana on her AIGA journey from chapter volunteer to national leader (inflatable banana stories included!), plus virtual event metrics that actually matter, gaining a seat at the table for your design career, and TypeCon's 25th anniversary almost two-for-one ticket special.
author: Together by Design
